name: Arnold Johnson
abstract: Arnold Johnson (March 23, 1893 – July 15, 1975) was an American big band pianist, arranger, composer, and leader during the swing jazz era. He was orchester leader on the popular The Majestic Theater of the Air program on the CBS radio network beginning in 1929.

about_quotes.speaker: Johnny DeDroit
about_quotes.evidence: I recorded with Johnson from Brunswick... I've seen some of those recordings with Johnson. Did you solo with him? ... No, never. Just ensemble.

about_quotes.speaker: Harold E. Peterson
about_quotes.evidence: And a fellow by the name of Arnold Johnson or something like that. Yeah. John Johnson played piano I think.
